message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Find all a vaccination documents in EPD
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelinestrategy solid
skinparam participantPadding 20
skinparam boxPadding 10
skinparam noteFontColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam participantStyle rectangle
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E0E0E0
skinparam participantBorderColor #999999
skinparam participantFontColor #000000
skinparam participantFontStyle bold
skinparam participantFontSize 12
skinparam participantPadding 10
skinparam participantMargin 5
skinparam participantBorderThickness 2
skinparam participantBorderRadius 5
skinparam participantShadowing true
skinparam participantShadowColor #CCCCCC
skinparam participantShadowOffset 2
skinparam participantShadowBlur 5
skinparam participantShadowOpacity 0.5
skinparam participantShadowStyle solid
skinparam participantShadowDirection bottom-right
skinparam participantShadowAngle 45
skinparam participantShadowDistance 5
skinparam participantShadowSpread 0
skinparam participantShadowInset 0
skinparam participantShadowInnerColor #FFFFFF
skinparam participantShadowOuterColor #CCCCCC
skinparam participantShadowInnerOpacity 0.8
skinparam participantShadowOuterOpacity 0.3
skinparam participantShadowInnerBlur 3
skinparam participantShadowOuterBlur 5
skinparam participantShadowInnerOffset 1
skinparam participantShadowOuterOffset 2
skinparam participantShadowInnerAngle 45
skinparam participantShadowOuterAngle 45
skinparam participantShadowInnerDistance 3
skinparam participantShadowOuterDistance 5
skinparam participantShadowInnerSpread 0
skinparam participantShadowOuterSpread 0
skinparam participantShadowInnerInset 0
skinparam participantShadowOuterInset 0
skinparam participantShadowInnerStyle solid
skinparam participantShadowOuterStyle solid
skinparam participantShadowInnerDirection bottom-right
skinparam participantShadowOuterDirection bottom-right
skinparam participantShadowInnerColor #FFFFFF
skinparam participantShadowOuterColor #CCCCCC
skinparam participantShadowInnerOpacity 0.8
skinparam participantShadowOuterOpacity 0.3
skinparam participantShadowInnerBlur 3
skinparam participantShadowOuterBlur 5
skinparam participantShadowInnerOffset 1
skinparam participantShadowOuterOffset 2
skinparam participantShadowInnerAngle 45
skinparam participantShadowOuterAngle 45
skinparam participantShadowInnerDistance 3
skinparam participantShadowOuterDistance 5
skinparam participantShadowInnerSpread 0
skinparam participantShadowOuterSpread 0
skinparam participantShadowInnerInset 0
skinparam participantShadowOuterInset 0
skinparam participantShadowInnerStyle solid
skinparam participantShadowOuterStyle solid
skinparam participantShadowInnerDirection bottom-right
skinparam participantShadowOuterDirection bottom-right

actor "HCP" as HCP
participant "GFPP/PIS" as GFPP_PIS
participant "Aggregator" as Aggregator
participant "CO-Registry" as CO_Registry
participant "CO-Repositiory" as CO_Repositiory
participant "CO-IGW" as CO_IGW
participant "OC-RGW" as OC_RGW
participant "OC-Registry" as OC_Registry
participant "OC-Repositiory" as OC_Repositiory

box "Community A" #LightGray
  participant "GFPP/PIS" as GFPP_PIS
  participant "Aggregator" as Aggregator
  participant "CO-Registry" as CO_Registry
  participant "CO-Repositiory" as CO_Repositiory
  participant "CO-IGW" as CO_IGW
end box

box "Community X" #LightGray
  participant "OC-RGW" as OC_RGW
  participant "OC-Registry" as OC_Registry
  participant "OC-Repositiory" as OC_Repositiory
end box

HCP -> GFPP_PIS: [01] Get all immunization data
GFPP_PIS -> Aggregator: [02] query all registries
Aggregator -> CO_Registry: [03] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
CO_Registry -> CO_Repositiory: [04] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
CO_Repositiory -> CO_Repositiory: [05] Lookup Data
CO_Repositiory -> CO_Registry: [06] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
CO_Registry -> CO_IGW: [07] request all communities
CO_IGW -> OC_RGW: [08] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-38]
OC_RGW -> OC_Registry: [09] Registry Stored Query Request [ITI-18]
OC_Registry -> OC_Repositiory: [10] Lookup Data
OC_Repositiory -> OC_Registry: [11] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
OC_Registry -> OC_RGW: [12] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-38]
OC_RGW -> CO_IGW: [13] end loop
CO_IGW -> CO_IGW: [14] Assemble Query Responses
CO_IGW -> GFPP_PIS: [15] Registry Stored Query Response [ITI-18]
GFPP_PIS -> GFPP_PIS: [16] list of document info
GFPP_PIS -> GFPP_PIS: [17] retrieve all documents
GFPP_PIS -> CO_IGW: [18] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
CO_IGW -> CO_Repositiory: [19] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
CO_Repositiory -> CO_Repositiory: [20] allocate document data
CO_Repositiory -> CO_IGW: [21] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
CO_IGW -> OC_RGW: [22] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-39]
OC_RGW -> OC_Repositiory: [23] Retrieve Document Request [ITI-43]
OC_Repositiory -> OC_Repositiory: [24] allocate document data
OC_Repositiory -> OC_RGW: [25] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
OC_RGW -> CO_IGW: [26] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-39]
CO_IGW -> CO_IGW: [27] Assemble Retrieve Responses
CO_IGW -> GFPP_PIS: [28] Retrieve Document Response [ITI-43]
GFPP_PIS -> Aggregator: [29] Aggregate documents
Aggregator -> GFPP_PIS: [30] one FHIR ch-vacd document
GFPP_PIS -> HCP: [31] Show immunization data

note right of HCP
  Version 1.0
end note

@enduml
```
